headline: Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) Q1 2026 Results Beat Estimates But Tepid Q2 Guidance Caps Gains

headline: Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) Exceeds Q1 CY2026 Expectations
summary: Adhesive manufacturing company Avery Dennison (NYSE:AVY) reported Q1 CY2026 results beating Wall Street’s revenue expectations, with sales up 7% year on year to $2.30 billion. Its non-GAAP profit of $2.47 per share was 1.8% above analysts’ consensus estimates.
